<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get deal event history"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/deals/{id}/history"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all events for a deal in version order.
